profile.belief: The paradox is that platforms grow when they stop chasing growth and start solving real friction.
profile.working_on: rebuilding creator platforms around what fans actually need between content drops, not just during them

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to cultivate genuine connections, believing that meaningful support for creators and fans fosters organic growth and fulfillment.
